detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract UserWallet (UserWallet.sol#219-336) has payable functions:
	 - UserWallet.fallback() (UserWallet.sol#243)
	 - UserWallet.execute(address,bytes,uint256,uint256) (UserWallet.sol#261-331)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [UserWallet](UserWallet.sol#L219-L336) has payable functions:
	 - [UserWallet.fallback()](UserWallet.sol#L243)
	 - [UserWallet.execute(address,bytes,uint256,uint256)](UserWallet.sol#L261-L331)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in UserAuth.setOwner(address) (UserWallet.sol#105-113):
	External calls:
	- RegistryInterface(registry).record(owner,nextOwner) (UserWallet.sol#107)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- owner = nextOwner (UserWallet.sol#109)
	UserAuth.owner (UserWallet.sol#79) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- UserAuth.isAuth(address) (UserWallet.sol#125-139)
	- UserAuth.owner (UserWallet.sol#79)
	- UserAuth.setOwner(address) (UserWallet.sol#105-113)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [UserAuth.setOwner(address)](UserWallet.sol#L105-L113):
	External calls:
	- [RegistryInterface(registry).record(owner,nextOwner)](UserWallet.sol#L107)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [owner = nextOwner](UserWallet.sol#L109)
	[UserAuth.owner](UserWallet.sol#L79) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [UserAuth.isAuth(address)](UserWallet.sol#L125-L139)
	- [UserAuth.owner](UserWallet.sol#L79)
	- [UserAuth.setOwner(address)](UserWallet.sol#L105-L113)

detectors.description:
UserAuth.setOwner(address).nextOwner (UserWallet.sol#105) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = nextOwner (UserWallet.sol#109)

Reentrancy in UserAuth.setOwner(address) (UserWallet.sol#105-113):
	External calls:
	- RegistryInterface(registry).record(owner,nextOwner) (UserWallet.sol#107)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- LogSetOwner(nextOwner) (UserWallet.sol#111)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [UserAuth.setOwner(address)](UserWallet.sol#L105-L113):
	External calls:
	- [RegistryInterface(registry).record(owner,nextOwner)](UserWallet.sol#L107)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [LogSetOwner(nextOwner)](UserWallet.sol#L111)

detectors.description:

	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow

	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage.
It is used by:
	- ^0.5.2 (UserWallet.sol#1)

detectors.description:
execute(address,bytes,uint256,uint256) should be declared external:
	- UserWallet.execute(address,bytes,uint256,uint256) (UserWallet.sol#261-331)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
_data location should be calldata
detectors.markdown:

Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
